task_completion.description: Verify the meeting URL file was created with the correct room and parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal or text editor showing the creation or contents of '/home/ga/meeting_url.txt'. The text must include the room 'VirtualBootcamp2024' and the parameters 'config.startWithAudioMuted=true', 'config.startWithVideoMuted=true', and 'config.subject="Morning Bootcamp - Advanced Level"'.

task_completion.description: Verify the configuration report file was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal or text editor showing the creation or contents of '/home/ga/meeting_config_report.txt' discussing the parameter effects.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent joined the correct Jitsi Meet room in a web browser.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser open to Jitsi Meet. The URL bar or the meeting interface should clearly indicate the room name 'VirtualBootcamp2024'.

task_completion.description: Verify the meeting started with audio muted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Jitsi Meet browser window, the microphone icon in the bottom toolbar must have a slash through it, indicating the audio is muted.

task_completion.description: Verify the meeting started with video muted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Jitsi Meet browser window, the camera icon in the bottom toolbar must have a slash through it, indicating the video is muted.

task_completion.description: Verify the meeting subject is correctly set to the required text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Jitsi Meet browser window, the meeting subject/title displayed (usually at the top of the screen) must exactly read 'Morning Bootcamp - Advanced Level'.

task_completion.description: Verify the screenshot of the configured meeting was saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal command (e.g., using scrot, import, or similar screenshot tools) or a file manager showing the creation of the file '/home/ga/meeting_configured.png'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually opened a web browser to join the meeting.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a real web browser interface (like Chromium or Firefox) rendering the Jitsi Meet application, not just a text-based curl response or a mocked image.

integrity.description: Verify the text files were created using genuine system tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show terminal commands (like echo, nano, vim, or cat) or a GUI text editor being used to write to '/home/ga/meeting_url.txt' and '/home/ga/meeting_config_report.txt'.

integrity.description: Verify the meeting UI was not faked using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Jitsi Meet interface should look standard without open developer consoles modifying the DOM to fake the subject text or mute icons.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires constructing a Jitsi Meet URL for the room 'VirtualBootcamp2024' with three specific hash parameters: config.startWithAudioMuted=true, config.startWithVideoMuted=true, and config.subject='Morning Bootcamp - Advanced Level'. The VLM should verify that the browser URL contains these parameters (usually appended after a '#' symbol) and that the Jitsi Meet UI reflects these settings: the microphone and camera icons must show as muted (crossed out), and the meeting subject displayed at the top of the screen must exactly match 'Morning Bootcamp - Advanced Level'.
